query:
SELECT 
  'questions' as tableName, COUNT(*) as rowCount FROM questions
UNION ALL
SELECT 'responses', COUNT(*) FROM responses
UNION ALL
SELECT 'contacts', COUNT(*) FROM contacts
UNION ALL
SELECT 'systems', COUNT(*) FROM systems
UNION ALL
SELECT 'taskDefinitions', COUNT(*) FROM taskDefinitions
UNION ALL
SELECT 'taskCompletion', COUNT(*) FROM taskCompletion
UNION ALL
SELECT 'validationResults', COUNT(*) FROM validationResults
UNION ALL
SELECT 'workflowPathways', COUNT(*) FROM workflowPathways;
